system.description: When you consult your accumulated knowledge about something, tell the Director what subject you are interested in learning about, and roll +Brains.

failure.value: The Director gives you an Irrelevant Prompt. You get no follow-up questions.

partial.value: The Director gives you a General Prompt tangentially related to the situation or subject. You can ask 1 follow-up question.

success.value: The Director gives you a Specific Prompt directly relevant to the situation and subject. You can ask 2 follow-up questions.

critical.value: The Director gives you a Specific Prompt directly relevant to the situation and subject, and you gain an Edge. You can ask 3 follow-up questions.
